work_packages.title: Project Management and Coordination
work_packages.description: Overall project coordination, administrative and financial management, quality assurance, risk management, and coordination with ADRA and GenAI4EU central Hub. Includes consortium governance, reporting, and ethics compliance oversight.

work_packages.title: Neuro-Symbolic Planning and Reasoning Engine
work_packages.description: Design and implement the hybrid neuro-symbolic planning engine. Research on sub-task graph decomposition with formal pre/post-conditions, integration of MCTS and HTN planning with LLM-based heuristics, plan monitoring and self-correction from verified intermediate states. Integrates formal tool selection and invocation policies from the External Tool and API Orchestration Layer, enabling the planning engine to reason about when and why to invoke external tools versus relying on agent-internal capabilities.

work_packages.title: Adaptive Memory Architecture
work_packages.description: Design and implement the unified tri-store memory architecture (working, episodic, semantic memory) with a learned memory controller. Research on memory indexing, retrieval strategies, forgetting mechanisms, and coherence maintenance over long interaction horizons. The semantic memory store hosts the typed tool registry and tool capability models; episodic memory stores tool execution traces and learned tool-selection heuristics for experience-based tool orchestration.

work_packages.title: Decentralised Multi-Agent Coordination
work_packages.description: Develop formally specified task-delegation and negotiation protocols for heterogeneous AI agents. Research on convergence guarantees, conflict resolution under partial observability, auditable multi-agent interaction traces, and scalable decentralised coordination. Includes protocols for shared tool access governance, delegated tool invocation across agents, and conflict resolution when multiple agents require the same external resource.

work_packages.title: Healthcare Demonstrator — Clinical Decision Support
work_packages.description: Co-design and validate the MAESTRO agent framework in a clinical decision support system. Define clinical use cases and diagnostic benchmarks, integrate with clinical data sources (HL7 FHIR), deploy specialist sub-agents for imaging/lab/guideline reasoning, and conduct clinical expert validation.

work_packages.title: Manufacturing Demonstrator — Process Optimisation
work_packages.description: Co-design and validate the MAESTRO agent framework for manufacturing process optimisation. Define production line scenarios and KPIs, integrate with digital twin environments, deploy multi-agent real-time coordination across production segments, and validate in pilot factory over 3-month operational period.

work_packages.title: Logistics Transfer Demonstrator — Cross-Sector Generalisation
work_packages.description: Co-design and validate the MAESTRO agent framework for logistics and supply chain operations as a cross-sector transfer demonstrator. Define multi-actor logistics scenarios and disruption recovery benchmarks, deploy agent-based planning with negotiation across supply chain actors, and validate on real operational data across 3 international corridors. Confirms that the integrated planning–memory–coordination–tool-orchestration architecture generalises beyond the call's specifically identified Apply AI sectors.

work_packages.title: Integration, Evaluation and Benchmarking
work_packages.description: Define the cross-cutting evaluation framework and benchmark suite. Integrate the three research pillars and the External Tool and API Orchestration Layer into a unified MAESTRO framework. Conduct cross-demonstrator evaluation with standardised KPIs and benchmarking. Coordinate validation through Testing and Experiment Facilities. Produce the MAESTRO benchmark suite for community adoption. Includes a targeted architectural mapping analysis assessing the MAESTRO architecture's transferability to in-vehicle autonomous driving settings.

work_packages.title: Dissemination, Exploitation and Communication
work_packages.description: Manage open-source framework release and community building. Coordinate AI-on-demand platform contributions. Lead EDIH network dissemination and technology transfer. Develop and execute exploitation strategy per partner. Manage project communication, website, and public engagement.
